name: Trango Detergent Powder
description: Trango All In One Detergent Powder delivers superior cleaning with its advanced formula. It removes tough stains, leaves clothes bright, and gives long-lasting fragrance. Each 1kg pack comes with a free 250g dishwasher tub worth ₹40.

name: Shampoo
description: This shampoo gently cleanses your scalp while providing deep nourishment to your hair. Infused with natural oils and proteins, it promotes smoothness, strength, and long-lasting shine.
features: Enriched with natural oils and proteins

name: Trango Toilet Cleaner
description: Trango Toilet Cleaner is a powerful disinfectant specially formulated to remove tough stains, kill 99.9% of germs, and leave your toilet fresh. With 10X cleaning power compared to ordinary bleach and powder, it ensures deep hygiene with every use.
features: Suitable for Indian toilets and septic tanks
Safe with proper usage and precautions

name: Trango chotu pack
description: Trango Eco Wash is designed for the environmentally conscious, offering powerful cleaning with biodegradable ingredients.

name: Trango Dishwash Bar
tagline: Extra Shine & Clean with Active Lemon
description: Trango Dishwasher Bar delivers powerful grease-cutting action with the freshness of lemon. Designed to tackle oily stains and tough residues, it leaves utensils sparkling clean with a refreshing scent.
features: Removes tough oil and food stains
Safe for hands and effective on steel

name: Trango Quick Wash
description: Ideal for busy households, this fast-action detergent delivers spotless clothes in less time.

name: Trango Lemon Fresh
description: Infused with lemon extracts, it not only cleans but also refreshes your laundry with a citrusy burst.

name: Trango Supreme White
description: Designed especially for white clothes, Trango Supreme White restores brightness and removes dullness.

name: Trango Active Power
description: Packed with active enzymes to break down dirt and grease, delivering a professional-grade clean.

name: Trango Fabric Care Liquid
description: Special liquid detergent designed for fabric care with a powerful cleaning formula that removes stains while keeping clothes soft and fresh.

name: Trango Fresh Scent
description: Leaves your clothes with a lasting floral scent while giving a thorough clean every time.

name: Trango Liquid Detergent
description: Perfect for delicate fabrics and front-load machines, this liquid detergent ensures no residue and silky finish.

name: Trango Color Guard
description: Trango Color Guard ensures your clothes retain their vibrancy even after multiple washes.

name: Trango Budget Pack
description: Quality cleaning at an unbeatable price. Great for daily washing needs in budget-conscious households.

name: Trango Premium Care
description: High-performance detergent for luxurious care of clothes, combining fabric conditioner and deep clean.

name: Trango Heavy Duty
description: Trango Heavy Duty is perfect for uniforms, overalls, and heavily soiled clothes from industrial environments.
